title: CPVP Mobs
description: A datapack that makes mobs able to crystal pvp.
body:
## **Have you ever wanted to do Crystal PVP but your internet was absolute trash ? Well this datapack is here just for you!**

Mobs have always been too easy to kill, you can hit 1/2 crits and they die﻿. And this datapack completly fixes that by making them use the most **Advanced and Powerful PVP** Method : Crystal PVP.


They will now have full Netherite with Protection 4 and they will place Obsidian and Ender Crystals to absolutely **DESTROY you**, And when i say that, I really mean it. They can kill you in Mere Seconds ! Good luck on trying to beat the game with that !


Note : They wont use Anchors or use Golden Apples when PVPING and only the mobs capable of wearing netherite armor will be capable of Crystal Pvping, like Zombies, Skeletons, Wither Skeletons, etc...

(If you want to make a Tiktok or Youtube video on this Datapack make sure to credit me and the datapack)
